data.title: U.S. Considers Currency Swap with UAE Amid Iran Conflict Fallout
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that a currency swap with the United Arab Emirates (UAE) is being considered. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move comes as the UAE, a key U.S. ally, explores options for financial support to mitigate the economic impact of the ongoing conflict with Iran. The potential currency swap aims to strengthen economic ties and provide stability amid regional tensions.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stocks Open Higher as Dow Jones Rises 0.5%
data.description: U.S. stocks experienced an upward trend at the opening today, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by 0.5%. According to NS3.AI, this positive movement reflects investor optimism amid ongoing economic developments. The rise in the Dow Jones suggests a favorable market sentiment as traders assess the impact of recent financial data and geopolitical events. Analysts are closely monitoring these trends to gauge future market directions.

data.title: Bitcoin is now calmer than South Korea's stock market — and that's a bigger deal than it sounds
data.description:
Key takeaways
Bitcoin's 30-day realized volatility has dropped to 42%, below South Korea's Kospi (51%) and Pakistan's KSE 100 (51%).War-driven energy shocks from the Iran conflict hit oil-dependent economies like South Korea and Pakistan hard, while bitcoin held a relatively narrow range of $65,000–$75,000.Spot ETF inflows since January 2024 have brought more institutional, risk-managed capital into bitcoin, structurally dampening its price swings.A ceasefire between warring parties is set to expire Wednesday, making the coming days a key test for both markets.
Bitcoin has long carried the reputation of crypto's most volatile major asset — an instrument capable of doubling or halving in a matter of months. That narrative is being quietly rewritten. For the first time in recent memory, bitcoin's 30-day realized volatility has fallen below that of South Korea's benchmark Kospi index and Pakistan's KSE 100, two of the world's more turbulent equity markets right now. The shift is not a coincidence — and it may have lasting implications for how bitcoin is perceived as an asset class.

Why Korean and Pakistani stocks got so turbulent
The volatility spike in South Korean and Pakistani equities is not a mystery — it traces directly to the energy shock triggered by the war between Iran and the U.S.-Israeli coalition, which began on February 28. The eventual closure of the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most critical oil supply routes, sent energy prices sharply higher and hit economies with heavy fossil fuel import dependence particularly hard.

South Korea imports nearly all of its oil and natural gas, making its equity market acutely sensitive to disruptions in Middle Eastern supply chains. The Kospi fell from 6,340 points in late February to 5,000 by end of March — a decline of more than 20% — before rebounding to record highs above 6,380 as the conflict eased and a temporary ceasefire was negotiated. Pakistan's KSE 100 saw comparable swings for similar reasons, with its economy equally exposed to energy market volatility.

data.title: Dogecoin Foundation and MoonPay Donate DOGE to Support U.S. Canine Welfare
data.description: MoonPay and the Dogecoin Foundation, along with its corporate division House of Doge, have announced a joint donation of 1 million DOGE to the AKC Humane Fund. According to Foresight News, the donation aims to support charitable initiatives focused on protecting and improving the lives of dogs within the United States. The funds will be allocated to several key projects of the AKC Humane Fund, including providing assistance to domestic violence shelters for pet owners, conducting stray dog rescues, and offering essential veterinary care to families facing financial difficulties. Additionally, MoonPay has officially enabled DOGE payment functionality through MoonPay Commerce, allowing users to donate directly to the foundation using DOGE or other cryptocurrencies.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Discusses Iran, Fed Rates, and Anthropic Developments
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump recently shared his views on several key issues, including the ongoing negotiations with Iran, military strategies, and economic policies. According to Jin10, Trump expressed confidence in reaching a significant agreement with Iran, emphasizing the importance of not rushing the process and having ample time to finalize a beneficial deal. He noted that the U.S. holds a favorable position in the negotiations.

Regarding potential military actions, Trump mentioned that targeting Iran's infrastructure could inflict military damage if an agreement is not reached, stating that preparations are already in place for such scenarios. He also highlighted the success of the blockade, asserting that the U.S. has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz, although ships are seeking alternative routes.

Trump commented on Iran's potential to return to a stable path through a rational agreement, urging Iran to act with common sense to become a legitimate nation. He expressed surprise at the rebound of U.S. stocks during the Iran conflict, initially expecting a 20% drop in the Dow Jones and S&P 500 indices and oil prices to soar to $200 per barrel.

On monetary policy, Trump conveyed disappointment if the new Federal Reserve Chair does not promptly lower interest rates, advocating for the U.S. to set the lowest global rates. He criticized the Supreme Court's tariff ruling and suggested that Switzerland should contribute more financially to the U.S., with a slight increase in tariffs.

Trump also mentioned the possibility of providing financial aid to the UAE and exploring currency swap arrangements. In the tech sector, he acknowledged Anthropic's positive development trajectory and expressed willingness to consider agreements that would allow the company to resume contracts with the Department of Defense.

data.title: Investors Remain Unfazed by Iran Conflict Amid Market Trends
data.description: Investors are currently overlooking the ongoing conflict in Iran, focusing instead on market trends. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that bearish strategies have generally underperformed since 2010. However, this approach may lead to potential disruptions if companies fail to meet expectations.

data.title: Canton and ZKsync Debate Onchain Finance Approaches
data.description: Canton and ZKsync are engaged in a public debate over the best approach for onchain finance, focusing on whether it should depend on network-wide rule enforcement or private validation between counterparties. According to NS3.AI, Alex Gluchowski advocates for zero-knowledge systems anchored to Ethereum, which he believes can enforce shared rules effectively. In contrast, executives from Digital Asset argue that Canton can maintain trust without the need for a global shared state.

data.title: Poland's Defense Group Aims for Record Year Amid EU Military Spending Surge
data.description: Poland's largest defense group is poised for another record-breaking year as the European Union's most substantial land force increases its military expenditure. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the group's strategic move to counter potential threats from Russia while leveraging new EU funding opportunities. This development underscores the growing emphasis on defense within the EU, driven by geopolitical tensions and the need for enhanced security measures. The Polish defense sector is expected to benefit significantly from this increased spending, positioning itself as a key player in the region's military landscape.

The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 44.23, a daily increase of 1.12%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 68.40, a daily increase of 1.47%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.03% to 6.81743. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.19% to 159.129. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 1.40% to $90.66 per barrel. Brent crude oil rose 0.92% to $96.36 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly within the platform, providing a one-stop solution for various asset classes including precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration between crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi functionality is fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to conveniently participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities beyond the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: XRP Surges 28% as Price Exceeds Realized Value
data.description: XRP has experienced a significant increase, rising 28% from its macro low of $1.12. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency has surpassed its realized price of $1.41, bringing the average holder back into profit. Currently trading at $1.44, XRP's chart setup indicates a potential target of $2.24 if the price breaks above $1.46.

data.title: US stocks opened mixed in the crypto sector, with Circle (CRCL) down nearly 2%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.60%, the S&P 500 rose 0.25%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.29%. The crypto sector showed mixed performance, with Solana rising 1.89%, Bitmine rising 0.13%, and SharpLink rising 0.06%; while Circle fell 1.92%, Coinbase fell 1.51%, and Strategy (MSTR) fell 0.61%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Blockchain Project Tempo Launches Stablecoin Advisory Service to Aid Adoption
data.description:
A new blockchain initiative, Tempo, supported by payment company Stripe and venture capital firm Paradigm, has introduced a 'stablecoin advisory' service aimed at assisting businesses and financial institutions in adopting stablecoins. According to BlockBeats, this service promises to offer clients support, including identifying suitable application scenarios and deploying 'frontline engineers' to collaborate directly within client operations to facilitate smooth stablecoin integration.

Since Fortune magazine first disclosed the project in mid-2025, Tempo has garnered significant attention within the crypto industry. In October 2025, the company announced a $500 million funding round, valuing it at $5 billion, and officially launched in March this year. The blockchain, focused on payments, is betting that with adequate technical support and expertise, businesses will integrate stablecoins into their payment processes.

Meanwhile, Circle's successful initial public offering and renewed interest in stablecoins from major corporations such as Meta, X, and Google highlight the optimistic sentiment towards blockchain payments in the tech and business sectors. With backing from payment giant Stripe, Tempo is striving to become a key player in mainstreaming stablecoins. The company is currently collaborating with DoorDash to explore options for its delivery personnel to receive compensation in stablecoin form.

data.title: Ave.ai officially announced an upgrade to its "New Financial Platform," expanding the boundaries of on-chain transactions and AI.
data.description: On April 20th, the “AVE AI Trading Forum Hong Kong 2026”, hosted by Ave.ai, was officially held. The forum invited partners such as Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, BNB Chain, and TON to participate and exchange ideas on AI, on-chain trading, and the development of new finance. At the event, Ave.ai officially announced a strategic upgrade, moving from an on-chain trading platform to a new financial platform. After more than five years of development, Ave.ai has served 20 million users and is gradually expanding from meme trading to a wider range of trading scenarios including spot, contracts, RWA, equity assets, precious metals, crude oil, and pre-IPO. Prediction market functionality will also be officially integrated in May. Meanwhile, AI is a core direction in Ave.ai's future strategy. The platform will continue to strengthen its AI capabilities in on-chain data analysis, trading signal recognition, and automated trading, using blockchain and AI technologies to lower the barriers to trading, meet users' needs for high-quality asset trading, and accelerate the arrival of the new financial era.

data.title: NATO Monitors Russian Submarine Activity Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: As global attention focuses on the unfolding conflict in Iran, NATO is simultaneously engaged in a strategic operation reminiscent of the Cold War era. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting NATO's efforts to track Russian submarines navigating through the Arctic waters. This operation underscores the ongoing geopolitical tensions and the strategic importance of the Arctic region in global security dynamics.

data.title: RollX Rewards Claiming Period to End in 7 Days
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that the claiming period for RollX rewards is set to conclude in 7 days. Eligible users are advised to navigate to the 'Discover' section, select 'Booster,' and then proceed to 'My Total Rewards' to claim their rewards. Users can utilize the 'Batch Claim' option located at the top right to claim all rewards in one click.

The deadline for claiming these rewards is 8 AM UTC on April 28, 2026. It is important for users to note that any rewards not claimed by this time will be forfeited. This announcement serves as a reminder for eligible participants to ensure they claim their rewards before the specified deadline to avoid losing them.

data.title: Security investigators disclose a zero-day severity vulnerability in Cosmos CometBFT.
data.description: Security researcher Doyeon Park published an article on the X platform disclosing a zero-day vulnerability in the Cosmos consensus layer (CometBFT). This vulnerability, classified as CVSS 7.1 (high) severity, could cause nodes in the Cosmos ecosystem to stall during block synchronization, but direct asset theft would not be feasible. The ecosystem safeguards over $8 billion in assets. While the Cosmos vulnerability disclosure (CVD) process has been followed to ensure ecosystem security, due to a lack of cooperation and irresponsible decision-making by the vendors, the decision has been made to proceed with the disclosure based on their final decision.

data.title: Meta Platforms' Price Target Reduced by BofA Analyst Ahead of Q1 2026 Earnings
data.description: BofA Securities analyst Justin Post has revised the price target for Meta Platforms, lowering it from $885 to $820 while maintaining a Buy rating on the company's shares. According to NS3.AI, this adjustment comes in anticipation of Meta's Q1 2026 earnings report. Post projects that Meta will achieve $56 billion in revenue for the first quarter, which surpasses the consensus estimate on Wall Street.

data.title: OCBC Introduces Tokenized Gold Fund on Ethereum and Solana
data.description: OCBC has launched GOLDX, a tokenized physical gold fund available on the Ethereum and Solana blockchains. According to NS3.AI, this initiative provides on-chain exposure to a LionGlobal fund, which holds approximately $525 million in assets as of April 16. The product was developed in collaboration with Lion Global Investors and DigiFT. OCBC stated that institutional investors have the option to subscribe using stablecoins or fiat currency, with tokens being directly transferred to their blockchain wallets.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Mining Giant Reports Over $20 Billion Profit in First Quarter
data.description: A major mining company has announced impressive financial results for the first quarter, with profits exceeding $20 billion. According to Jin10, the company's strong performance highlights the lucrative nature of the gold industry. Additionally, a standout company in the agricultural sector reported a net profit increase of over 70 times compared to the previous year. Meanwhile, a well-known enterprise in the environmental sector is planning a significant cross-market restructuring, leading to a suspension of trading starting tomorrow. These announcements are among the key updates following today's market close.

data.title: SEC Chairman Outlines Future Strategy in Washington Speech
data.description:
U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul S. Atkins delivered a speech marking his one-year anniversary at the Washington Economic Club, focusing on the SEC's future 'A-C-T' strategic plan. According to Foresight News, Atkins highlighted the SEC's initiative in the crypto sector, known as 'Project Crypto,' which aims to enhance market on-chain integration. The SEC is set to introduce an 'innovation exemption' to support compliant on-chain trading of tokenized securities and is committed to establishing long-term industry regulations.

In addressing capital markets, Atkins proposed the 'Make IPOs Great Again' agenda, which includes a series of reforms. These reforms involve implementing a regulatory IPO 'on-ramp,' expanding policies currently available only to emerging and small businesses to more companies, providing nearly all public companies with a simplified 'shelf registration' process for quicker market access, and allowing companies the choice to submit financial reports quarterly or semi-annually.

Additionally, the SEC is monitoring transparency and credit quality in the private credit sector, aiming to enable more investors to participate in diversified investments under reasonable safeguards. Future enforcement efforts will focus on combating fraud and holding individuals accountable to enhance market integrity and protect investors.
